articles.summary: 提出DeepSearch-Evolve自蒸馏框架，通过可验证环境中的自我改进训练深度搜索智能体。相比SFT或弱强化学习，该方法利用自生成轨迹迭代提升，在复杂工具使用任务上取得更优结果。

articles.title: EvolvingWorld: An Open-Schema Framework for Co-Evolving Role-Play Agents and World Model in Interactive Literary World
articles.excerpt: This paper introduces EvolvingWorld, a framework and benchmark for character and world co-evolution in interactive literary worlds. articles.summary: 引入EvolvingWorld，一个角色与世界共同演化的开放模式框架与基准。突破静态角色模仿与孤立场景生成，实现交互式文学世界中角色与世界的动态演化，提供更丰富的叙事模拟。

articles.title: SWE-Pruner Pro: The Coder LLM Already Knows What to Prune

articles.summary: 提出SWE-Pruner Pro，利用编码器LLM内部表征直接进行上下文剪枝，无需外部分类器。通过分析模型对代码相关性的内部编码，实现更高效、更准确的长上下文剪枝，加速编码智能体。

articles.title: HOMIE: Human-object Centric Video Personalization via Multimodal Intelligent Enchancement
articles.excerpt: Human-object centric video personalization (HOCVP) is a core task within subject-driven video generation. However, existing methods suffer from two key limitations. articles.summary: 针对人-物中心视频个性化生成，提出HOMIE方法，通过多模态智能增强在主体保真度与运动可控性之间取得平衡。相比现有方法，在视频个性化任务上实现更高保真度与更好视频质量。

articles.title: Apple-π: Benchmarking Thinking with Video Towards Law-Grounded Physical Intelligence
articles.excerpt: Modern video generation models are increasingly hailed as emerging world models with an internalized grasp of physical law. articles.title: GigaChat Audio: Time-aware Large Audio Language Model
articles.excerpt: Temporal grounding in long recordings remains challenging for audio-conditioned LLMs. We present a time-aware audio LLM that answers questions with explicit timestamps over up to 120 minutes of input. articles.summary: 提出GigaChat Audio，时间感知大型音频语言模型，可对长达120分钟的录音回答带时间戳的问题。通过周期时间标记与连续音频令牌交错，利用大规模合成数据训练，实现精准时间定位。

articles.title: FlowMimic: Mask-free Visual Editing and Generation with Pixel-pair Warped Flow Field for Online Video Editing Data Generation and Modality Mimicry

articles.title: ReflectWorld-MM: An Entity-Oriented Multimodal Memory System for Open-Ended Video Streams

articles.summary: 构建ReflectWorld-MM，面向实体的多模态记忆系统，支持持续感知开放视频流并长期记忆推理。通过实体为中心的记忆结构，在长期视频流问答任务上超越现有记忆增强智能体。

articles.title: Group Entropy-Controlled Policy Optimization

articles.title: Mage-Flow: An Efficient Native-Resolution Foundation Model for Image Generation and Editing
articles.excerpt: Large-scale visual generators are increasingly capable but costly to train, fine-tune, and deploy. articles.summary: 推出Mage-Flow，一款4B参数的紧凑型原生分辨率图像生成与编辑基础模型。结合Mage-VAE（高效变分自编码器）与Mage-Transformer，在文本到图像生成与指令编辑任务上达到强竞争力，训练与推理成本显著降低。

articles.title: SeerGuard: A Safety Framework for Mobile GUI Agents via World Model Prediction

articles.summary: 提出SeerGuard，一种基于世界模型预测的移动GUI智能体安全框架，通过预测行动后果实现主动防护，避免不可逆错误。在Android GUI任务上，相比反应式安全机制大幅降低风险动作率。

articles.title: DataFlow-Harness: A Grounded Code-Agent Platform for Constructing Editable LLM Data Pipelines
articles.excerpt: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to automate data-processing workflows, yet coding agents typically produce scripts that are not automatically materialized as persistent, editable platform artifacts. articles.summary: 提出DataFlow-Harness，一种基于代码智能体的平台，构建可持久、可编辑的LLM数据管道。解决了NL2Pipeline差距，使生成的脚本自动转化为可复用的平台工件，提升数据处理自动化效率。

articles.title: Environment-free Synthetic Data Generation for API-Calling Agents

articles.summary: 评测LLM在空间约束下生成结合分子的能力，针对基于结构的药物设计。相比扩散模型，LLM方法在满足物理空间约束方面仍有差距，但展示了在条件生成中的潜力，为结合生成提供了新思路。

articles.title: LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks

articles.title: Distilled Reinforcement Learning for LLM Post-training

articles.title: 中国AI公司月之暗面发布全球最大规模开源模型
